missions.name: Flight School: Orientation
missions.description: Get your bearings — the camera and the target slot.

objectives.name: Change your view
objectives.description: Press [v] to cycle the camera view.

objectives.name: Target the Moon
objectives.description: Press [t] to cycle the target slot; stop on the Moon. [T] clears it.

missions.name: Flight School: Plan a Burn
missions.description: Open the planner and plant your first maneuver.

objectives.name: Open the planner
objectives.description: Press [m] to open the maneuver planner.

objectives.name: Plant a transfer
objectives.description: With the Moon targeted, press [H] to plant a transfer burn toward it.

missions.name: Flight School: Fly It
missions.description: Execute a burn and climb away from your starting orbit.

objectives.name: Climb above 700 km
objectives.description: Warp to your burn ([G]) or fire manually ([b]) and raise your altitude past 700 km.

missions.name: Make a 1000 km Orbit
missions.description: Trim a clean, near-circular orbit at 1000 km.

objectives.name: Circular orbit at 1000 km
objectives.description: Raise and round out your orbit to 1000 km altitude (±5%, e ≤ 0.01).

missions.name: Luna Flyby
missions.description: Coast into the Moon's sphere of influence.

objectives.name: Enter Luna's SOI
objectives.description: Target the Moon, plant a transfer ([H]), and coast until the Moon's gravity takes over.

missions.name: Luna Capture
missions.description: Brake into a bound orbit around the Moon.

objectives.name: Capture at Luna
objectives.description: Burn retrograde near periapsis to drop into a bound lunar orbit (e < 1).

missions.name: Luna Landing & Return
missions.description: Land on the Moon, then bring it home.

objectives.name: Land on Luna
objectives.description: Descend and touch down anywhere on the Moon's surface.

objectives.name: Return to Earth
objectives.description: Lift off, transfer back, and settle into a bound Earth orbit (or land).

missions.name: Rendezvous & Dock
missions.description: Bring two craft together and dock them.

objectives.name: Spawn a partner
objectives.description: Press [n] to spawn a second craft to rendezvous with.

objectives.name: Dock the two craft
objectives.description: Target the other craft ([t]), close in ([K] plants a rendezvous nudge), and dock.

missions.name: Mars Flyby
missions.description: Leave Earth's neighbourhood — fly past Mars.

objectives.name: Enter Mars' SOI
objectives.description: Plant an interplanetary transfer to Mars ([t] target Mars, [H]) and coast into its sphere of influence.

missions.name: Saturn V: Pad to LEO
missions.description: Do it the hard way — launch a Saturn V from the pad.

objectives.name: Reach orbit from the pad
objectives.description: Spawn a Saturn V on the launchpad ([n] → POSITION → launchpad → 28.6° KSC), fly the gravity turn — pitch east, stage as each booster empties — and circularize with periapsis above 200 km.
